response.overview: June’s everyday routine is mundane and repetitive. She cooks for Him before work and watches as he finishes his food, waiting for her turn to eat. Then she is fed and examined, often not at her own accord. He then goes to work and she waits by the phone, eager to listen and reminisce of the love that is no longer there.
response.tagline: Is your body really your body?
response.title: It’s For You!
